orzhov-syndicate.appears_on_match: drift caught: Sanguine Savior (MKM-230) had characters: [agency, orzhov-syndicate] frontmatter and symbols: [orzhov-signet] but was missing from this node's appears_on; orzhov-signet symbol node had it correctly listed, this node did not. Silent in-band attachment from a more recent wave that didn't backflow. Fixed inline.
orzhov-syndicate.sourcing: canonical with URLs (MTG Wiki Orzhov Syndicate, Wizards design articles, CBR, Card Kingdom, Scryfall watermark:orzhov)
orzhov-syndicate.body_claim_alignment: all 8 existing bullets match their card depictions; added 9th bullet for Sanguine Savior consistent with orzhov-signet symbol node's existing body framing (medallion-of-master form, dual-coded Orzhov+Agency)
orzhov-syndicate.wikilinks: all resolve (azorius-senate, agency, orzhov-signet, labor exist)

theros-pantheon.body_claim_alignment: each card's bullet correctly identifies whether it is god-card / cult-operative / flavor-text-attribution-only; the Mogis/Nylea/Heliod/Erebos/Pharika/Iroas/Kruphix/Thassa/Karametra/Purphoros/Athreos roster matches the card-by-card evidence

mareep-line.appears_on_match: all 4 reverse pointers verified; Flaaffy DAA-056 vision-only-print correctly excluded per the explicit caveat (ip_verified: false, no characters: pointer set)

mareep-line.body_claim_alignment: Mareep CRE-047 spring-meadow, Mareep DAA-055 forest scene, Flaaffy CRE-048 autumnal forest with bald-patches flavor — all match enrichment data; Mareep = ampere anagram verified letter-for-letter

description: First AUDIT-ONLY dispatch per bbl-edgelord-node-rigor-audit. 3-of-44 character nodes audited (orzhov-syndicate, theros-pantheon, mareep-line). One silent drift caught and fixed inline (orzhov-syndicate missing Sanguine Savior in appears_on despite the card having reverse frontmatter and the orzhov-signet symbol node having it correctly listed). Two clean. Drift rate at this sample: 1/3.
